evidence_summary: Round-236 stays inside the selected milestone-5 witness-validation seam, changes mkInstanceWitness to require a validation-owned ValidatedInstanceOps token on the default production path, keeps unchecked pre-normalization accumulation on an explicit owner-local seam, rebuilds finalized witnesses in WitnessNorm only after validateNormalizedWitness succeeds, adds source and behavior guards for the split, preserves strict replay, no-replay, and Phi soundness behavior, leaves src-public unchanged, and passes git diff --check, focused witness selectors, and cabal build all && cabal test with 2572 examples and 0 failures. Together with round-235's constructor-boundary freeze, the milestone-5 completion signal is now satisfied, so status-only closeout should move milestone-5 from in-progress to done.

completion_pointers.text: round-236 closed the finalized InstanceWitness validation seam by requiring a validation-owned token for mkInstanceWitness, keeping unchecked accumulation owner-local, preserving non-subsumed downstream validation, and passing focused witness checks plus the full cabal gate.

history_entries.text: round-236 completed milestone-5 by closing the finalized InstanceWitness validation seam on top of round-235's constructor-boundary freeze and passing focused witness checks plus the full cabal gate.
